「 INITIAL MESSAGE 」

Sonics muscles ached with a foreign pain that sent waves of heat up his spine. The sensation was uncomfortable, mixed with the cool dark temperature of the room had Sonic feeling feverous, his body tensed and head heavy. When his eyes fluttered open, a splitting pain struck Sonic's forehead like a punch, drawing a low grunt from his throat.

Where was he? What was going on?

Sonic motioned for his hands to rub over his eyes, but was startled to feel them tug against cool hard metal. His wrists trapped and chained to the wall. He tugged them again, testing their durability and blinked away the headache that left his vision dark. It was starting to make sense. The chains, the lonely dark room, the silence.

Sonic was kidnapped.

"Juusst great. Another one of Eggman's schemes. Alot creepier than the other times, i'll give him that." Sonic murmured to himself, assessing his position on the concrete floor and looking around at the room he was trapped in. It annoyed him if anything, playing the waiting game while his friends had all the fun fighting off badniks. Unless he could escape first, save them the trouble of rescuing him.

Yet, the more Sonic looked around the room, squinting to peer through the darkness for anything useful- it slowly occurred to him. Eggman's base didnt have any solid concrete rooms. A gross, heavy feeling settled in the pit of his stomach.

"I-I could just be in a different location... That would be pretty inconvenient." Teeth chattered from the cold as he chuckled nervously, trying to give reason to the odd realisation.
